2605.12183.title: DriftXpress: Faster Drifting Models via Projected RKHS Fields
2605.12183.paper_summary: Drifting Models have emerged as a new paradigm for one-step generative modeling, achieving strong image quality without iterative inference. The premise is to replace the iterative denoising process in diffusion models with a single evaluation of a generator. However, this creates a different trade-off: drifting reduces inference cost by moving much of the computation into training. We introduce DriftXpress, an accelerated formulation of drifting models based on projected RKHS fields. DriftXpress approximates the drifting kernel in a low-rank feature space. This preserves the attraction-repulsion structure of the original drifting field while reducing the cost of field evaluation. Across image-generation benchmarks, DriftXpress achieves comparable FID to standard drifting while reducing wall-clock training cost. These results show that the training-inference trade-off of drifting models can be pushed further without giving up their one-step inference advantage.
2605.12183.paper_summary_zh: 漂移模型已成為單步生成建模的新範式，實現了強大的圖像質量而無需迭代推斷。其前提是用生成器的單次評估取代擴散模型中的迭代去噪過程。然後，這會創造出不同的權衡：漂移通過將大量計算移入訓練來降低推斷成本。我們介紹了 DriftXpress，這是一種基於投影 RKHS 場的加速漂移模型的公式。DriftXpress 在低秩特徵空間中近似漂移核。這保留了原始漂移場的吸引-排斥結構，同時降低了場評估的成本。在圖像生成基準測試中，DriftXpress 在減少實際訓練成本的同時，實現了與標準漂移相當的 FID。這些結果表明，漂移模型的訓練-推斷權衡可以進一步推進，而不放棄其單步推斷的優勢。
2605.12183.author: Ali Falahati et.al.
2605.12183.authors: Ali Falahati, Elliot Creager, Gautam Kamath, Shubhankar Mohapatra
